# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 18, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 18, 2026, focused on expanding the plugin ecosystem through the submission of a new integration. There were no code changes, bug fixes, or documentation updates recorded for this period.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
